# 🔮 How we’ll know if we’re in an AI bubble (history’s 5 warning signs)

**From:** "Azeem Azhar, Exponential View" <exponentialview@substack.com>
**Date:** 2025-09-27T06:53:47.000Z
**Folder:** exponential

---

View this post on the web at https://www.exponentialview.co/p/ai-boom-bubble-podcast

Also on Apple Podcasts [ https://substack.com/redirect/264f3d44-45bf-4c15-aaaf-c9b41bfc3a58?j=eyJ1IjoicXd0ciJ9.0tEpqnOrcfuKYRYnEOurmlOZ_pVIUnS06konjQA-bCs ] and Spotify [ https://substack.com/redirect/22688bf3-f924-4359-b997-a00218a88477?j=eyJ1IjoicXd0ciJ9.0tEpqnOrcfuKYRYnEOurmlOZ_pVIUnS06konjQA-bCs ]
Last week, we published Is AI a Bubble? [ https://substack.com/redirect/97fbe8ae-edba-4073-934f-144d2cb58b07?j=eyJ1IjoicXd0ciJ9.0tEpqnOrcfuKYRYnEOurmlOZ_pVIUnS06konjQA-bCs ], an essay setting out a clear framework for assessing AI’s $10 trillion question.
The response to the essay was so strong that we distilled it into a short video and podcast for you – a quick guide to the framework and what it reveals about whether AI is a boom or a bubble.
What you’ll learn:
The framework: Our five gauges benchmark AI’s trajectory against past bubbles, from railways to dot-coms.
Historical parallels and differences: What happens when AI’s capital build has the heft of the railways, but its assets burn out like dot-com servers rather than steel tracks?
Investor implications: How to spot the signals that mark the shift from boom to bubble.
Strategic takeaway: Why today’s AI cycle still qualifies as a boom.
🧭 Dive into the full framework in our original analysis [ https://substack.com/redirect/97fbe8ae-edba-4073-934f-144d2cb58b07?j=eyJ1IjoicXd0ciJ9.0tEpqnOrcfuKYRYnEOurmlOZ_pVIUnS06konjQA-bCs ].
Thanks for all your questions and feedback. More to come soon.
